Refer to figure.
Based on the following VOLMET, where is the wind coming from relative to the direction of Runway 34?

"WIND 350 DEGREES 12 KNOTS, VISIBILITY 8 KILOMETRES, LIGHT RAIN, CLOUD, BROKEN 8 HUNDRED FEET, OVERCAST 1 THOUSAND FEET, TEMPERATURE 6, DEW POINT 4, QΝΗ 998 HECTOPASCALS"
